SEARCH
Package io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.persistence.constraints

Annotation Interface RequireEntity

@Documented @Retention(RUNTIME) @Target({FIELD,PARAMETER,TYPE}) @Constraint(validatedBy=io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.persistence.constraints.RequireEntityValidator.class) public @interface RequireEntity
Indicates that the annotated entity must be present or absent in the database.

The annotation can be applied to fields, parameters, or types. It uses the RequireEntityValidator to perform the validation.

  • Optional Element Summary

    Optional Elements
    Modifier and Type
    Optional Element
    Description
    boolean
    absent
    If true, the annotated entity must be absent (i.e., not exist).
    Class<?>[]
    groups
    Allows the specification of validation groups, to which this constraint belongs.
    String
    message
    The error message template.
    Class<? extends Annotation>[]
    payload
    Payload for clients of the Bean Validation API to specify additional information about the validation failure.
    String
    property
    The property path to which the validation error should be attached.
    Class<? extends EntityReferrer>
    referrerType
    The type of the entity referrer.
    boolean
    value
    If true, the annotated entity must be absent (i.e., not exist).

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final boolean
    DEFAULT_ABSENT_VALUE
    The default value representing whether an annotated entity should be considered absent.

  • Field Details

    • DEFAULT_ABSENT_VALUE

      static final boolean DEFAULT_ABSENT_VALUE
      The default value representing whether an annotated entity should be considered absent.

      This constant is used as the default value for the `absent` and `value` attributes in the RequireEntity annotation. It determines the initial state of whether an entity is expected to be absent or present during validation.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Element Details

    • value

      @AliasFor("absent") boolean value
      If true, the annotated entity must be absent (i.e., not exist). If false, the annotated entity must be present.
      Returns:
      true if the entity must be absent, false if it must be present
      Default:
      false

    • message

      String message
      The error message template. It can include a single '%s' placeholder, which will be replaced with the string representation of the invalid value in the validator.
      Returns:
      the error message template
      Default:
      "%s"

    • groups

      Class<?>[] groups
      Allows the specification of validation groups, to which this constraint belongs.
      Returns:
      the groups
      Default:
      {}

    • payload

      Class<? extends Annotation>[] payload
      Payload for clients of the Bean Validation API to specify additional information about the validation failure.
      Returns:
      the payload classes
      Default:
      {}

    • absent

      @AliasFor("value") boolean absent
      If true, the annotated entity must be absent (i.e., not exist). If false, the annotated entity must be present.
      Returns:
      true if the entity must be absent, false if it must be present
      Default:
      false

    • property

      String property
      The property path to which the validation error should be attached.
      Returns:
      the property path
      Default:
      ""

    • referrerType

      Class<? extends EntityReferrer> referrerType
      The type of the entity referrer.
      Returns:
      the class of the entity referrer
      Default:
      io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.persistence.models.EntityReferrer.class
